behavior_summary: U8P_EARTHMAG::func0080 launches a Book::read process to present a long Earthen Magic tome text to the player, captures the returned process id, and then suspends to wait for the display/process to continue or finish.

The embedded text contains instructions for Earthen Magic spells (Open Ground and Death Speak), reagents, and incantations; the routine's role is to hand that text to the book-reading subsystem rather than manage UI/dialog branching itself.
No global flags, branching logic, menus, or dialogue nodes are present; the function acts as a simple bridge between the object activation and the Book::read external routine.
notable_control_flow: Call Book::read with a pointer to a large string literal containing the Earthen Magic book text and 'this' as the caller.
Store the returned process id into local 'temp'.
Suspend the current process (yield/wait) after spawning the Book::read process.
open_questions: Which engine event or player action directly invokes U8P_EARTHMAG::func0080 (inferred to be 'read' or 'use' on the book but not explicit in the snippet)?
Does the suspend wait specifically for the spawned Book::read pid to finish, or does it perform a generic suspend until some external resume event occurs?
Are there any downstream script hooks (flags or callbacks) that react when the Book::read process completes which are not visible in this file?

main_function.name: U8P_EARTHMAG::func0080
main_function.purpose: Begin the book-reading/display process for the Earthen Magic tome by invoking Book::read with the embedded long text and the caller pid, then yield/suspend to wait for the reading process.
entry_conditions: No explicit entry checks inside the function.
Inferred: invoked when the player activates/reads the Earthen Magic book (caller responsibility).

function_map.name: U8P_EARTHMAG::func0080
function_map.role: Spawn/bridge to Book::read to display the Earthen Magic book text; capture spawned pid and suspend.

function_map.name: Book::read
function_map.role: External subsystem function that begins a book-reading/display process when given a pointer to text and a caller pid.

external_calls.purpose: Start/display a book-reading UI/process using a pointer to the embedded Earthen Magic text and the current pid; returns a process id for the spawned reader.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_EARTHMAG::func0080 launches a Book::read process to present a long Earthen Magic tome text to the player, captures the returned process id, and then suspends to wait for the display/process to continue or finish.
